task_completion.description: Verify BeamSetup.java is converted to a record type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of BeamSetup.java showing the class declaration changed to 'public record BeamSetup(String beamId, double gantryAngle, double collimatorAngle)' or similar.

task_completion.description: Verify BeamSetup.java preserves the gantry angle validation logic
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of BeamSetup.java showing a compact constructor (e.g., 'public BeamSetup {') or standard constructor containing an 'if' statement checking if gantryAngle is < 0 or > 360 and throwing an IllegalArgumentException.

task_completion.description: Verify TreatmentPlan.java is updated to use record accessors
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of TreatmentPlan.java showing method calls to '.beamId()' and '.gantryAngle()' instead of the old '.getBeamId()' and '.getGantryAngle()' methods.

task_completion.description: Verify the project compiles without errors
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Eclipse IDE showing no red error markers (x icons) on the project folder, BeamSetup.java, or TreatmentPlan.java in the Package Explorer, or a successful Maven compile output in the terminal.

task_completion.description: Verify all JUnit tests pass successfully
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Eclipse JUnit view showing a green bar for BeamSetupTest, or a terminal showing 'BUILD SUCCESS' from a 'mvn test' execution with no test failures.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used an IDE or text editor to modify the files
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show Eclipse IDE or another code editor being used to edit the Java files, rather than just terminal commands echoing code into files.
Screenshots should show genuine test execution UI (like the Eclipse JUnit tab with a green bar and run statistics) or standard Maven test output logs, not manually typed success messages.

integrity.description: Verify the test file was not modified to bypass validation
integrity.visual_evidence: If BeamSetupTest.java is visible, ensure the test methods (like testInvalidGantryAngle) are still present and not commented out or deleted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target class is 'com.medsys.rt.model.BeamSetup' and the dependent class is 'com.medsys.rt.service.TreatmentPlan'. The BeamSetup class must be a Java 17 Record. The validation logic that must be preserved in the BeamSetup record constructor is: 'if (gantryAngle < 0 || gantryAngle > 360) throw new IllegalArgumentException(...)'. The TreatmentPlan class must be updated to use the new record accessors 'beamId()' and 'gantryAngle()' instead of 'getBeamId()' and 'getGantryAngle()'. The test class 'BeamSetupTest' contains a test 'testInvalidGantryAngle' which expects this exact validation to be present.
